name: Inigo
description: Inigo — GraphQL management platform with query analytics, rate limiting, field-level access control, and caching.

seo.title: Inigo — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Inigo: Inigo — GraphQL management platform with query analytics, rate limiting, field-level access control, and caching.

when_to_use: GraphQL query rate limiting and cost analysis
Field-level access control for multi-tenant GraphQL API
Caching layer for expensive GraphQL resolvers
Query performance analytics for GraphQL API optimization
Schema change monitoring and breaking change detection

review.verdict: Focused GraphQL gateway with sharp analytics and security controls, best when Apollo GraphOS feels heavy.
review.best_for: Teams running public GraphQL APIs needing observability
review.not_for: REST-first stacks or simple internal GraphQL setups

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
